part_prompts.helmet:
Generate a UV-ready texture atlas for one armor module.
Target module: helmet (helmet shell with visor aperture, no face, no neck).
Style tags: metal, visor, audit. Palette primary=#1E2A3A, secondary=#A8B3C6, emissive=#3AC7FF. Hard-surface industrial hero armor, clean panel lines, production-ready concept sheet.
Output format requirements:
- 1:1 square texture map (base-color/albedo style), no perspective view.
- Resolution target: 2048x2048 equivalent detail density.
- Flat texture sheet only. Do NOT draw standalone objects, mannequins, or scene background.
- Texture fill ratio target: 82-96% of the canvas should contain intended material/panel information.
- Border seam-safe margin: outer 3-5% edges should be low-frequency detail only.
- Do not leave large blank white regions (>10% contiguous area).
- Maintain consistent material language across the whole sheet.
- UV layout intent: Visor band and frontal silhouette should occupy center U range (0.30-0.70). Top crown detail should concentrate in upper V range (0.58-0.92). Back-seam area near U<0.06 and U>0.94 must stay low-frequency.
- Keep directional panel lines continuous across UV seams (U wrap continuity).
- No text, watermark, logos, or frame graphics.
part_prompts.chest:
Generate a UV-ready texture atlas for one armor module.
Target module: chest (chest armor plate, sternum core area, no arms).
Style tags: metal, visor, audit. Palette primary=#1E2A3A, secondary=#A8B3C6, emissive=#3AC7FF. Hard-surface industrial hero armor, clean panel lines, production-ready concept sheet.
Output format requirements:
- 1:1 square texture map (base-color/albedo style), no perspective view.
- Resolution target: 2048x2048 equivalent detail density.
- Flat texture sheet only. Do NOT draw standalone objects, mannequins, or scene background.
- Texture fill ratio target: 82-96% of the canvas should contain intended material/panel information.
- Border seam-safe margin: outer 3-5% edges should be low-frequency detail only.
- Do not leave large blank white regions (>10% contiguous area).
- Maintain consistent material language across the whole sheet.
- UV layout intent: Main sternum line should stay around U=0.50 (approximately 0.42-0.58). Pectoral panel rhythm should be left-right symmetric in U. Outer edge zones U<0.05 and U>0.95 must remain seam-safe and low-density.
- Keep directional panel lines continuous across UV seams (U wrap continuity).
- No text, watermark, logos, or frame graphics.
